svg.title: Uber final system architecture — 7-tier corrected design
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture for Uber at global scale, showing 7 layers from client apps through edge, API gateway, microservices, Kafka streaming, polyglot data, and ML/geospatial layer. Corrected after 3 critical AI errors in storage, dispatch servers, and GPS bandwidth.

g.text: 16,000 Mbps internal · 3× replication · 4 consumers · corrected from AI\'s 40 Mbps
5–8 read replicas per region — AI omitted entirely; needed for R:W = 10:1

svg.text: T2 Edge — CloudFront CDN, anycast, WAF
T3 Gateway — 833K peak RPS, JWT auth
T5 Kafka — 16 Gbps internal (AI said 40 Mbps)
T6 Data — PG + Cassandra + Redis + S3
T7 ML — H3 geospatial, ETA, fraud
Click any component to learn more ↗
AI errors: storage 23× low · dispatch servers 7× low · GPS bandwidth 17× low
